title: Americans
content:
You can always tell the English,
     You can always tell the Dutch,
     You can always tell the Yankees -
     But you can't tell them much!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Americans", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
